column1: # grep-tells.tsv — TIER 1 (flat-presence) rules for audit-swiftui-liquid-glass (glass-01 … glass-18).
# severity: hard | warn | adv   (hard → runner exits 2). The runner greps each ERE over the target *.swift.
# This LOCATES only — the LLM agent READS each hit (SKILL.md step 3) and decides. Structural rules that
# grep cannot express (containment, gate-scope, co-occurrence) live in ast-grep/*.yml (tier 2).

column4: glass symbol present — REPORT only if deployment target < macOS 26 (read in ORIENT); else ignore. VERIFY it is gated #available(macOS 26, *).
iOS-arm gate in a macOS target → gate on #available(macOS 26, *) (wrong-arm, fix_mode: auto)
glass MAY be on content — confirm it is navigation-layer, not a List/ForEach/Table row/card/Text/Image
.clear variant — confirm not mixed with .regular in one container (glass-08); .clear requires a dimming layer beneath for legibility
prominent/tint — confirm only ONE primary action per screen carries it (tint spam = glass-09)
deprecated toolbar override BLOCKS toolbar glass → delete (glass-11, fix_mode: auto)
TextEditor — if in a NavigationSplitView detail, may force an opaque toolbar (glass-12); suggest .scrollEdgeEffectStyle(.soft, for: .top). UNVERIFIED.
material background — if co-located with .glassEffect() = double transparency (glass-13, advisory/UNVERIFIED)
auto-adopting chrome (toolbar/sidebar/sheet) — it gets glass FREE; a hand .glassEffect() on it is redundant/wrong (glass-10)
hand-rolled glass-ish button — if it's a plain glass button, prefer .buttonStyle(.glass) (glass-14)
TabView selection — if Tab(...) items + plain @State, restoration is lost → @SceneStorage (glass-15)
custom LabelStyle — if project floor is macOS 26, annotate @available(macOS, obsoleted: 26) (glass-16)
glassEffectID — verify all 4 morph conditions: container + shared @Namespace + withAnimation + conditional render (glass-17)
glassEffectUnion — verify siblings share shape + variant + tint (glass-18)
